stemHtml: On your altimeter, there is window displaying black and white stripes that can be partially or fully seen. Which statement correctly describes the occasion when you will see the FULL band?

options.a: When you fly below an altitude of 10 000 ft.
options.b: When your rate of climb/descent is greater than 1000 ft/min.
options.d: When the altimeter is set to the incorrect pressure setting.
